one_time_description: Distribution from Lhai Ventures Limited Partnership - non-recurring distribution
economic_notes: Nation has investments in 0987339 BC Ltd. (which consolidates Stellat'en Holdings Limited Partnership and Stellat'en Holdings Inc.), Stellako Custom Wood Ltd., and non-controlling interests in Lhai Ventures Limited Partnership (25%) and Endako Tsey Limited Partnership (25%). Earnings from Nation business entities were $2,967,506 in 2024.
notes: Nation uses modified equity method for two wholly-owned business entities (0987339 BC Ltd. and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd.) and cost method for two limited partnerships (Lhai Ventures LP at 25% and Endako Tsey LP at 25%). The 0987339 BC Ltd. year-end is December 31, 2023, consolidated without adjustment into March 31, 2024 statements. Large non-recurring distribution of $931,804 from Lhai Ventures LP. Carrier Sekani Tribal Council revenue of $4,765,853 is unusually large compared to budget of $80,000 - likely includes pass-through or special funding. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,133,288) + FNHA ($324,080) + CMHC ($88,000) + Province of BC ($315,550) = $4,860,918; OSR includes resource industry revenue, CSFS, CSTC, PGAET, Ottawa Trust, LP distribution, other revenue and business entity earnings. Restricted cash of $1,508,522 relates to unexpended gaming funds. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text.
